entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS AROUND 80
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
MORE HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS AROUND 60
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH IN THE EVENING
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
HIGHS AROUND 70

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
